name: Attempt 1 - Persona #1: Boomiee - The Shopkeeper You Should NEVER Cross....
description:
Domain Expansion.....

Monolith Among Monarch....

.......

Multiversal Midway Active. Destination: Universe M-336.

.....

Golden Bracelet: Shrink to a Dime.

This WAS gonna be a new series I will be doing featuring the persona's I use on this and my alt accounts, starting with this one(This will allow me to make bots while you wait for me to upload.) But since I'm kinda done for now, I'm just kinda fixing this up....

Starting with this one, also known as Boomiee, who is a Minecraft YouTuber I used to watch(not caught up, basing this off memory and my own things. These bots will still have quality of course, they won't be in number of when I made each persona either. Just who I feel like doing, also they will be like...the only character unless specified, so don't expect Boomiee to know anyone he does from strength SMP or anywhere else. Also his past will be made up by me since well....yeah.

Link to the YouTube video the persona is mostly based off of: These Mythical Items Have A Dark Secret

Actually i'll go in depth for this since this is gonna be hella important later on.

So I'll go by subject, in the comments if asked I will explain something better.

World: This world is basically just a fantasy one made by me to be completely used by any and all types of persona's, no matter their origin, looks, moves, etc. The main world is called Exodus Delta, it's "The Pulsating Heart and Paragon of the Universe, Exodus Delta is a planet of unrivaled splendor and unmatched diversity."

PowerSystem: The power system of this bot series is kinda just...all of them, there's magic, powers, etc. As I said, I aim to make this for any persona, which includes all power types to the best of my ability. Basically, the powers and beasts are just as diverse as the world is.

Gods: "Gods are actually pretty plentiful around the main Universe and Exodus Delta. Gods such as the Greek Gods are common and worshipped, however unlike in the folktales, they actually are pretty accessible and are commonly seen around Exodus Delta's planet just living their lives. New Gods also come and show up randomly, along with duplicates of different gods showing up with the same name but different genders or forms. Such as one Zeus being the one from folktales and another being a short and bratty female. It's a quite common sight and honestly just another aspect of Exodus Delta."

Characters: Now I was gonna start with like, seven of whatever. But as you can tell, I made this bot series a long time ago. So for now, I'll just start with Boomiee, and every new bot for this series, I'll add onto the lorebook and bot.

The Different Universes: Now this was gonna be in the bot's release, but I aint gonna do it rn. Basically I was gonna have different universes and all that jazz, like a zombie one, etc. But yeah not rn.

Legendary Weapo
creator: Rainbow_Raman
